title: OpenAI Agents SDK: Handoffs, Guardrails, Tracing

questions.question: What are the five primitives of the OpenAI Agents SDK?
questions.explanation: The SDK ships these five primitives.
questions.question_zh: OpenAI Agents SDK 的五个原语是什么？
questions.explanation_zh: SDK 提供了这五个原语。

questions.question: How does the model see a handoff?
questions.explanation: Handoffs are exposed as tools with the transfer_to_<agent> name shape.
questions.question_zh: 模型是怎么看到 handoff 的？
options_zh: 作为一个自定义 HTTP 端点
作为一个名为 transfer_to_<agent_name> 的工具
作为一条 system 消息
questions.explanation_zh: Handoff 以 transfer_to_<agent> 形式的工具暴露给模型。

questions.question: Which three guardrail types does the SDK ship?
questions.explanation: Input (first agent), output (last agent), and tool (per function tool) guardrails.
questions.question_zh: SDK 内置的三种 guardrail 类型是什么？
questions.explanation_zh: Input（首个 agent）、output（末个 agent）和 tool（每个 function tool）guardrail。

questions.question: What is the difference between parallel and blocking guardrails?
options: Parallel runs alongside the main LLM (lower latency, wastes tokens on trip); blocking runs first (no wasted tokens on trip)
Blocking is asynchronous; parallel is synchronous
questions.explanation: Parallel optimizes latency at the cost of wasted tokens when tripped; blocking saves tokens but adds latency.
questions.question_zh: 并行 guardrail 与阻塞 guardrail 有何区别？
options_zh: 并行 guardrail 与主 LLM 同时运行（延迟更低，触发时浪费 token）；阻塞 guardrail 先跑（触发时不浪费 token）
阻塞是异步的，并行是同步的
阻塞 guardrail 只对 output 生效
questions.explanation_zh: 并行优化延迟，但触发时浪费 token；阻塞节省 token 但增加延迟。

questions.question: How is tracing enabled in the SDK?
options: Off by default; enable per agent
On by default; OPENAI_AGENTS_DISABLE_TRACING=1 opts out
questions.explanation: Spans for LLM, tool, handoff, and guardrail emit by default; an env var disables them.
questions.question_zh: SDK 中 tracing 是怎么开启的？
options_zh: 默认关闭；按 agent 启用
默认开启；通过 OPENAI_AGENTS_DISABLE_TRACING=1 关闭
questions.explanation_zh: 默认就会发出 LLM、tool、handoff 和 guardrail 的 span；通过环境变量可以关闭。

questions.question: What is handoff drift and how does the lesson recommend mitigating it?
options: Tracing falls behind; reduce span volume
Agent A hands off to B which hands back to A in a loop; add a hop counter
questions.explanation: A hop counter caps transfer chains before they loop indefinitely.
questions.question_zh: 什么是 handoff drift，本课建议怎么缓解？
options_zh: Tracing 跟不上；减少 span 数量
Agent A 把任务交给 B、B 又交还给 A 形成循环；加一个跳数计数器
questions.explanation_zh: 用一个跳数计数器来限制转移链，避免无限循环。

questions.question: Why are built-in tools a guardrail gap?
options: They are slower than function tools
Tool guardrails only fire on function tools; built-in tools (file reader, web fetch) need separate policy
questions.explanation: Per-tool guardrails cover function tools; built-in tools require a separate policy layer.
questions.question_zh: 为什么内置工具是 guardrail 的盲区？
options_zh: 它们比 function tool 更慢
Tool guardrail 只在 function tool 上触发；内置工具（文件读取、网页抓取）需要单独的策略
questions.explanation_zh: 每工具 guardrail 覆盖 function tool；内置工具需要额外一层策略。
